2:
The haunted manor teems with seasonal spectacles of all sorts─including a pumpkin-headed gentleman who appears ready to greet you. Speak with him to learn more of the Continental Circus's masquerade.

※In the event that you leave the area, you may return by speaking with the genial guiser at Mih Khetto's Amphitheatre.

The Haunted Manor teems with seasonal spectacles of all sorts─including a pumpkin-headed gentleman who appears ready to greet you. Speak with him to learn more about the Continental Circus's masquerade.

※In the event that you leave the area, you may return by speaking with the genial guiser at Mih Khetto's Amphitheatre.

5: Your investigation of the haunted manor reveals that the Conitinental Circus's troupe members have begun to run amok, terrifying the participating patrons in so doing. The Impresario must be informed of his fellows' wrongdoings, and he awaits your report in the manor foyer.

Your investigation of the manor reveals that the Continental Circus's troupe members have begun to run amok, terrifying the participating patrons. The Impresario must be informed of his fellows' wrongdoings, and he awaits your report in the manor foyer.

6: The Impresario is flummoxed upon hearing of the turmoil his fellow thespians are causing, as he believes his presence will only encourage their schemes. You both find yourself at a loss, until the voice of the pumpkin-headed apparition rings clear in your mind─you must return to Gridania for the solutions you seek.

The Impresario is flummoxed upon hearing of the turmoil his fellow thespians are causing, as he believes any action he takes will serve only to encourage them further. You too find yourself at a loss, until the voice of the pumpkin-headed apparition rings clear in your mind. It would seem you must return to Gridania for the solutions you seek.

7: The pumpkin-headed apparition is sympathetic to the Impresario's plight and eager to aid in your quest to calm the Continental Circus's unruly members. To do so, she requires a bag of All Saints' cookies from the shady smock, as well as a decorative pumpkin from Greatloam Growery.

The pumpkin-headed apparition is sympathetic to the Impresario's plight and eager to aid in your quest to calm the Continental Circus's unruly members. To do so, she requires a bag of All Saints' cookies from the shady smock, as well as a decorative pumpkin from the Greatloam Growery.

8: With pumpkin and cookies procured, the apparition will have all she needs to concoct her creation. Deliver them to her at Mih Khetto's amphitheatre, that she might begin her work in earnest.
With pumpkin and cookies procured, the apparition will have all she needs to concoct her creation. Deliver them to her at Mih Khetto's Amphitheatre, that she might begin her work in earnest.

9: The apparition thanks you for your assistance in gathering the required materials, reassuring you that her solution will quell the current uproar in the manor. Once her preparations are complete, she plans to inform you at her earliest convenience.

The apparition thanks you for your assistance in gathering the required materials, assuring you once more that her solution will quell the current uproar in the manor. When her preparations are complete, she plans to inform you at her earliest convenience.

25: Speak with the Impresario at the haunted manor.
Speak with the Impresario at the Haunted Manor.

50: Heh heh... 'Tis a treat to see you again in this season of tricks, adventurer. Enjoying the festivities, I trust?
Heh heh... We meet again, adventurer. Enjoying the festivities, I trust?

51: While the saints are away, a well-known theatre troupe has stopped in Gridania to play... They host a grand masquerade in the old manor, that they might sate their hunger for merriment.
While the saints are away, a well-known theater troupe has stopped in Gridania to play... They host a grand masquerade in the old manor, that they might sate their hunger for merriment.

54: Their ghoulish gala proceeds apace at the manor. Knowing the troupe's hunger for mischief as I do, however, I sense that it may not remain so for much longer...
Their ghoulish gala is the talk of the town. And knowing the troupe's appetite for mischief as I do, I sense what lies in store...

55: Heh heh... I implore you to view the spectacle for yourself. You need only speak with the genial guiser. He shall guide your steps to the haunted manor.
I implore you to view the spectacle for yourself. You need only speak with the genial guiser. He shall guide your steps to the Haunted Manor.

71: But I tire of shadowy schemes and the accusations that often follow. So I shall lay bare my shrouded secrets as a symbol of good faith to you. However...you must swear never to reveal this truth to others.
But I tire of shadowy schemes and the accusations that often follow. So I shall lay bare our secret as a gesture of good faith. However...you must swear never to share with others what I reveal.

72: We of the Continental Circus merely disguise ourselves as mortal men and women. In truth, we are a troupe of otherworldy creatures, and for some of us, our monstrous “costumes” are, in fact, our true form. Were my own glamour dispelled, you would see me as I truly am─an imp.

Though we of the Continental Circus disguise ourselves as mortal men and women, we are in truth a troupe of otherworldly creatures. For some of us, our monstrous “costumes” are, in fact, our true form. Were my own glamour dispelled, you would see me as I truly am─an imp.

73: Not so long ago, our ultimate goal was to dye this realm in blackest night and usher in a long-coveted legend among my kind: the Night of Devilry, where our leader, the Great Gourd, would rise again and strike terror into the hearts of men.

Not so long ago, our ultimate goal was to drown this realm in blackest night and usher in a long-coveted legend among my kind: the Night of Devilry, where our leader, the Great Gourd, would rise again and strike terror into the hearts of men.

74: But as a few voidsent compatriots have recently taught us, there lies a reward even sweeter than mortal fear. One that fills our hearts and satiates our souls!
But as a few voidsent compatriots have recently taught us, there lies a reward even sweeter than mortal fear. One that fills our hearts and satiates our souls─gratitude!

75: One taste, they said, and we would be unable to deny the fulfillment it brought us. Thus, the Circus abandoned its malevolent ambitions to pursue honeyed words of gratitude instead.
One taste, they said, and we would be unable to deny the fulfillment it brought us. Thus, the Circus abandoned its malevolent ambitions to pursue honeyed words of appreciation instead.

76: When glorious autumn twilight reigns supreme across this realm, mortal and voidsent must join hands in harmony, and carouse to their heart's content! In doing so, they shall know unforgettable thrills and chills beyond their comprehension!

When glorious autumn twilight reigns supreme across this realm, mortal and voidsent must join hands in harmony, and carouse to their hearts' content! In doing so, all shall know unforgettable thrills and chills beyond comprehension!

81: W-Why, that's not splendorous at all! Please, you must believe me. We have no intention of affrighting our guests! At least, not like this...
Wh-Why, that's not splendorous at all! Please, you must believe me. We have no intention of affrighting our guests! At least, not like this...

84: I must remain here to welcome our guests... So I beseech you, adventurer, survey the manor and discover what has brought our patrons such distress.
I beseech you, adventurer, survey the manor and discover what has brought our patrons such distress, starting with the second floor. I shall remain here to oversee affairs.

86: You may use mounts within the haunted manor, but only during this quest.
You may now use mounts within the Haunted Manor.

87: I shall do my utmost to keep our remaining guests entertained in the meanwhile. Please, you must investigate the manor in my stead and find out what sort of harm the others might be causing.
I shall do my utmost to salvage this sordid situation from here. Please, investigate the manor in my stead and find out what is going on.

90: This performer is too absorbed in their mischief to hear your pleas to stop.
This performer is too absorbed in their mischief to listen to what you have to say.

93: Heh heh... Next, I could gouge out some eyeballs... Maybe even slurp up a few organs while I'm at it...
Heh heh... Next, I could gouge out some eyeballs... Maybe even gobble up a few fresh organs while I'm at it...

100: Gimmie an elixir! And some candy, too!
Gimme an elixir! And some candy, too!

102: Hm. Despite our newfound mission, we do still take great pleasure in mortals' fits of fright. I suspect they have forgotten themselves and prioritized their own enjoyment over that of our guests. And if that is so, turmoil is inevitable.
Hm. Despite our newfound mission, we do still take great pleasure in mortals' fits of fright. I suspect they have forgotten themselves and prioritized their own enjoyment over that of our guests.

105: We cannot allow my brethren's rampaging to go unchecked. But if they will not listen to the reprimands of an adventurer, I imagine my presence would only serve to enable their unruly behavior...
We cannot allow my brethren's antics to go unchecked. But if they will not listen to the reprimands of a kindly adventurer, I can hardly imagine they would heed mine...

109: Has that mortal mind of your conjured up any reasonable solutions? We cannot afford to let the rest of the troupe have their way for much longer... I shall continue to welcome guests here and consider our options.

Has that mortal mind of yours contrived any reasonable solutions? We cannot afford to let the rest of the troupe have their way for much longer─I daresay our patrons will soon reach their limits. For now, I shall continue to watch over matters here and consider our options.

110: Heh heh... Welcome back. The children of the Circus are a fascinating bunch, are they not? Their antics never fail to amuse me.
You are returned. The children of the Circus are a fascinating bunch, are they not? Their antics never fail to amuse me.

112: I shall begin the preparations. For your part, I would ask you to procure a few necessary components.
I shall begin the preparations. For your part, I would ask you to procure a few necessary ingredients.

115: Hee hee... Sorry, dearie, we're not selling at the moment─ Hm? On request from the pumpkin-head, you say?
Hee hee... Sorry, dearie, we're not selling at the moment─ Hm? Here on behalf of the pumpkin-head, you say?

117: There you go! One bag of freshly baked All Saints' cookies, just for you. Send the pumpkin-head my regards, won't you?
There you go! One bag of freshly baked All Saints' cookies. Send the pumpkin-head my regards, won't you?

118: In need of a decorative pumpkin, are you? Well, you're in luck! I've got one just the right size─freshly carved, as well.
In need of a decorative pumpkin, are you? Well, you're in luck! I've got a plump and round one here─freshly carved, no less.

119: We of the Botanists' Guild take great pride in our pumpkins. They make for sweet treats and charming decorations this time of year... I do hope you'll make good use of yours!

We of the Botanists' Guild take great pride in our pumpkins, and are glad to share them with one and all. They make for sweet treats and charming decorations this time of year... I do hope you'll make good use of yours!

122: Heh heh... Have you gathered our materials?

124: With this, I shall concoct a creation that will strike terror into the hearts of naughty children who have forgotten their purpose, and joy into the hearts of weeping mortals...
Now, I shall concoct a creation that will strike terror into the hearts of naughty children who have forgotten their purpose, and joy into the hearts of weeping mortals...
